This is represented by the LTL formula 'F G pullup'. Therefore, the complete formula is G((limits & !standby & supported & !apfail) -> F G pullup).

explanation_dict.natural_language: Exceeding sensor limits
the pilot is not in control (not standby)
the system is supported without failures (not apfail)
when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail)
Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail) (condition)
